gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用幽默对抗悲伤，一段由误拨语音引发的跨时空浪漫，温柔又独特。
gems.whyWatchEn: A poignant yet funny romance sparked by misdirected voicemails, turning grief into an unexpected connection.
gems.audience: 喜欢温暖治愈、非典型爱情故事的观众，以及能接受幽默与悲伤并存的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy warm, unconventional love stories and those who appreciate humor blended with melancholy.

gems.title: 火遮眼
gems.summary: 女儿在街头被拐走，店主（谢苗 饰）探寻一个复杂的犯罪网络，不择手段将女儿救回来。他唯一的盟友是一名记者（乔•塔斯利姆 饰）。这两个来自不同背景的人物必须学会相互信任、合作，运用自己不为人知的过去所赋予的格斗技能。
gems.summaryEn: After Wang Wei's daughter is kidnapped by a criminal network and he receives no help from the corrupt police, Wei sets out to find her himself. His only ally is Navin, a relentless journalist whose wi
gems.whyWatch: 硬核寻女与跨国联手，动作戏扎实，情感内核远超普通犯罪片。
gems.whyWatchEn: A gritty, emotional thriller with raw action and an unlikely alliance, elevating a familiar premise through sheer intensity.
gems.audience: 钟爱硬核动作片、追凶复仇题材的观众，以及谢苗与乔·塔斯利姆的动作影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of hard-hitting action, revenge thrillers, and admirers of Xie Miao and Joe Taslim's martial arts performances.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP勇敢直面数字时代焦虑，怀旧与创新平衡得恰到好处。
gems.whyWatchEn: A surprisingly thoughtful continuation that tackles screen-age childhood with heart, humor, and fresh toy characters.
gems.audience: 陪伴玩具总动员长大的老粉丝，以及想带孩子探讨‘电子陪伴’话题的家长。
gems.audienceEn: Longtime Toy Story fans and parents looking for a family film that thoughtfully addresses screen time and modern play.
